sql_array: CREATE TABLE shard_num_test (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE=MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE subquery_test (num UInt8) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT value, shardNum() AS shard_index FROM shard_num_test  WHERE id != ANY (SELECT num FROM subquery_test WHERE num > 1);
SELECT value, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM shard_num_test GROUP BY value HAVING row_count != ANY (SELECT COUNT() FROM subquery_test WHERE num < 3);
CREATE TABLE complex_test (a UInt32, b Nullable(Float64), c Nullable(String)) ENGINE=MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO complex_test VALUES (1, 1.5, 'Hello'), (2, NULL, NULL), (3, 2.5, 'World');
SELECT a, b, shardNum() FROM complex_test WHERE b != ANY (SELECT b FROM complex_test WHERE b IS NOT NULL);
SELECT a, c, shardNum() FROM complex_test WHERE c != ANY (SELECT c FROM complex_test WHERE b IS NULL);
SELECT a, COUNT(shardNum()) FROM complex_test GROUP BY a HAVING COUNT(shardNum()) != ANY (SELECT COUNT() FROM complex_test WHERE a <= 2);
CREATE TABLE boundary_test (num Int32, str String) ENGINE=MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT str, shardNum() FROM boundary_test WHERE num != ANY (SELECT 2147483647 + 1 UNION SELECT -2147483648 - 1);
SELECT str, shardNum() FROM boundary_test WHERE num != ANY (SELECT (SELECT max(num) FROM boundary_test) + 1);
CREATE TABLE null_test (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE=ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{shard}/null_test', '{replica}') ORDER BY id;
SELECT value, shardNum() FROM null_test WHERE value != ANY (SELECT value FROM null_test WHERE value IS NULL);
